name: Cocoa Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and mix well until fully incorporated.
2. Transfer the mixture to an airtight container for storage.
3. To prepare cocoa, add four teaspoons of the mix to a cup of boiling water.
4. Stir until dissolved and enjoy your homemade hot cocoa.
5. The recipe can be halved if desired.
6. Consider sharing portions as gifts with mugs, marshmallows, or cookies for extra appreciation.
